title: マイルCSの後に・アツアツ激突！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The clash between Hishi Akebono's sheer power
and Biko Pegasus's infallible spirit electrifies the
crowd.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both of them are equally fired up, and Biko
Pegasus is overcome with joy when she
remembers how to run her own way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They promise to run against each other in an even
bigger race and set a rematch for the upcoming
Takamatsunomiya Kinen!
